name: LATOKEN Crypto Exchange API
what_it_does: Cryptocurrency exchange with REST and WebSocket API — enabling traders and developers to access spot trading, order management, market data, and account operations, with notable focus on Security Token Offerings (STOs) and IEOs alongside standard crypto trading pairs.
use_cases: Accessing spot market data via LATOKEN API for cryptocurrency price feeds and order books
Executing trades via LATOKEN API for algorithmic trading strategies
Managing orders via LATOKEN API for trading bot order lifecycle management
Fetching account balances via LATOKEN API for portfolio tracking and reporting
Participating in IEOs via LATOKEN API for token launch integrations
not_for: High-frequency trading requiring sub-millisecond latency (use top-tier exchanges)
US-based traders (LATOKEN is restricted in US)
Enterprise custody solutions (use Fireblocks or BitGo for institutional custody)
best_when: A developer needs to integrate with a mid-tier exchange that supports IEOs and security tokens, or requires access to emerging market trading pairs not available on top-tier exchanges.
avoid_when: You need top-tier liquidity, US compliance, or institutional-grade reliability.

auth.notes: HMAC-SHA256 signature. Headers: X-LA-APIKEY, X-LA-SIGNATURE, X-LA-TIMESTAMP. Timestamp: milliseconds since epoch. Signature: HMAC-SHA256 of method + path + body (concatenated). API key from LATOKEN account settings. REST API at api.latoken.com/v2/. WebSocket: wss://api.latoken.com/. No OAuth2. US-restricted access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; trading fees: 0.1% maker/taker standard
pricing.paid_tiers: VIP tiers based on 30-day volume with reduced fees
pricing.notes: Estonian company (Tallinn). Founded 2017. ~400+ trading pairs. Focus areas: IEOs (Initial Exchange Offerings) — platform for new token launches; STOs (Security Token Offerings) — regulated security tokens. Launchpad: new project listing platform. LATOKEN token (LA): native exchange token for fee discounts. Known issues: lower liquidity vs top-tier exchanges; IEO projects quality varies. US-restricted. KYC required for trading. Hackathon platform. API v2 documented. HMAC signature with path inclusion.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: X-LA-APIKEY/SIGNATURE/TIMESTAMP headers. HMAC-SHA256 with path included. US-restricted. Estonian company. IEO/STO focus. Lower liquidity. KYC required.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: GET requests idempotent. Order placement: use client order ID for idempotency where supported. Market data reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: HMAC signature includes: HTTP method + path + request body (all concatenated, case-sensitive)
X-LA-TIMESTAMP must be within 5 seconds of server time — sync NTP
US-restricted exchange — US IP/residency may block access
Lower liquidity than top-tier exchanges — slippage risk for large orders
KYC required before trading — API access may be limited without KYC
IEO/STO tokens may have limited liquidity and high volatility

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HMAC-SHA256 with path inclusion — moderate security. GDPR compliant (Estonian company). No OAuth2 scope granularity — single API key controls all permissions. KYC required. Exchange hack risk: mid-tier exchange with less security investment than top-tier. API key and secret require secure storage. IP whitelist recommended for production trading bots.
